PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Nov-27-2023 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Oct-02-2023 Continued To Nov-27-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Ritzi Lam appeared via zoom for Patricia Martin (petitioner).

Ms. Lam stated that they were married for 38 years, that the LLC was under the decedent's name and was the sole owner, that they don't know the value of the LLC, and that the LLC was drawn with a promissory note. Spousal property petition is continued to November 27, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Carbona: Not reported.
